byd_customized_flags.state: Enabled (meaning WebRTC HW decoding is DISABLED)
byd_customized_flags.note: BYD disabled WebRTC hardware video decoding

byd_customized_flags.state: Enabled (meaning WebRTC HW encoding is DISABLED)
byd_customized_flags.note: BYD disabled WebRTC hardware video encoding

byd_customized_flags.state: Enabled (meaning JS harmony shipping is DISABLED)
byd_customized_flags.note: BYD disabled shipping JavaScript harmony features

byd_customized_flags.state: Enabled (meaning HW video decoding is DISABLED)
Enabled (meaning HW video encoding is DISABLED)

filesystem_write.desc: Writes netlog.json to user data directory. Confirms filesystem write capability exists from browser process.
filesystem_write.attack_value: HIGH - proves filesystem write path works, netlog contains full HTTP traffic

filesystem_write.desc: Broker file operations on disk cache in Network Service
filesystem_write.attack_value: MEDIUM - controls file operation brokering for disk cache

code_loading_paths.desc: Enables experimental support for isolated web apps
code_loading_paths.attack_value: HIGH - IWAs have elevated filesystem/device permissions

code_loading_paths.desc: Enables installation of UNVERIFIED Isolated Web Apps
code_loading_paths.attack_value: CRITICAL - allows unverified IWA installation, bypasses signature checks

code_loading_paths.desc: Installs developer mode IWA from HTTP(S) URL
code_loading_paths.attack_value: CRITICAL - direct code loading from arbitrary URL

code_loading_paths.desc: IWA Controlled Frame - embed content with elevated control
code_loading_paths.attack_value: HIGH - IWA can control embedded frames

code_loading_paths.desc: Enables experimental Web Platform features in development
code_loading_paths.attack_value: HIGH - single toggle unlocks many experimental APIs

security_bypass.desc: Treat insecure origins as secure. Comma-separated list input.
security_bypass.attack_value: CRITICAL - bypasses secure-context requirements for clipboard, sensors, SAB, service workers, etc.
HIGH - bypasses cert validation for localhost requests

security_bypass.desc: Blocks insecure (HTTP) downloads. Can be DISABLED.
security_bypass.attack_value: MEDIUM - disabling allows HTTP downloads without warning

security_bypass.desc: Disable CSP connect-src enforcement for Web Payment API
security_bypass.attack_value: MEDIUM - CSP bypass for payment manifest/icon/SW fetches
HIGH - disabling site isolation enables cross-site data access

security_bypass.desc: Prevents non-secure contexts from requesting private IPs. Can be disabled.
security_bypass.attack_value: MEDIUM - disabling allows HTTP pages to access LAN devices

security_bypass.desc: Uses origins instead of eTLD+1 for isolation

device_access.desc: WebUSB API on extension service workers
device_access.attack_value: HIGH - enables WebUSB in service worker context

storage_and_data.desc: Storage Access API - request storage when restricted
Storage Buckets API - multiple storage buckets per origin

storage_and_data.status: available, default (enabled by default in Cr113)

storage_and_data.desc: Partition third-party storage by top-level site
storage_and_data.attack_value: LOW - disabling allows cross-site storage access

network_and_tls.desc: Run network service in browser process (no sandbox)
network_and_tls.attack_value: MEDIUM - enabling removes network service sandboxing

network_and_tls.desc: Allow SHA-1 in TLS server signatures

pwa_and_install.desc: Detailed PWA install dialog with screenshots
PWA installation prompt via Messages UI

debug_and_logging.desc: Detailed logcat logging for external navigation decisions

download_controls.desc: Block HTTP downloads. Can be disabled to allow unblocked downloads.
Warning about incognito downloads being visible

key_absence_findings.no_file_system_access_api_flags: No chrome://flags entries for File System Access API. Runtime check confirms showSaveFilePicker/showOpenFilePicker/showDirectoryPicker are NOT in window.
key_absence_findings.opfs_available: navigator.storage.getDirectory() IS available (Origin Private File System) - sandboxed per-origin filesystem
key_absence_findings.webkit_filesystem_available: window.webkitRequestFileSystem IS available (legacy Chrome Filesystem API) - provides sandboxed FS write capability
key_absence_findings.no_extension_loading: No flags for extension sideloading or loading unpacked extensions - standard Android Chromium limitation
